name: harness
description: Planner / Generator / Evaluator loop for harness-driven application development with split specs, sprint contracts, and per-sprint progress.

interface.longDescription: Agentic Harness turns a short product idea into a file-backed loop: Planner writes a short docs/spec.md index, detailed docs/spec/*.md files, and docs/sprints/sprint-N.md contracts; Generator implements one sprint at a time and writes docs/progress/sprint-N.md; Evaluator verifies the result before the next sprint.
defaultPrompt: Use Agentic Harness to build a small web app.
Start a Planner -> Generator -> Evaluator loop.
